summary: Wake Orchestrator now treats Meet chat as a first-class Kabosu input channel while preserving the existing voice path.
residual_risk: Chat context is in-memory in wake-orchestrator; persistent chat tables and rolling summaries remain future work.
External URL body fetching is intentionally not implemented, so replies are instructed not to claim the linked content was read.
Live meeting E2E still requires real Vexa, Groq, and Aivis credentials plus an active meeting.
